user.name: Alma

comment.body:
on 0dte there is not vega hedging. 
i explained it many times: gamma and vol are inverserly correlated. if gamma goes down, vol naturally increases, bcs of how the formula works: if it is not the spot that makes the delta move, then it is vol (vanna). 
or more intuitively: low gamma means less hedging against the move, or even into the direction of the move if gamma is negative.
comment.raw_body:
on 0dte there is not vega hedging. 
i explained it many times: gamma and vol are inverserly correlated. if gamma goes down, vol naturally increases, bcs of how the formula works: if it is not the spot that makes the delta move, then it is vol (vanna). 
or more intuitively: low gamma means less hedging against the move, or even into the direction of the move if gamma is negative.

comment.body:
the color effect was the key.
there is 4 lvls:
1) amateurs look at naive gex, miss the shades of the positioning
2) beginners look at first order greeks only + gamma
3) advanced plp take 2nd orders into account (gamma, vanna, charm + speed)
4) but sometimes it is the 3rd orthers that matter (speed, color, vomma)
comment.raw_body:
